entities.name: INDIA

entities.description: A unique source of information used for the longitudinal village studies.

entities.description: Studies carried out since 1975 in selected districts of India to analyze village economics.

entities.description: The broader research framework in India that the village studies contribute to.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The primary subject of analysis within the study villages since independence.

entities.name: DRYLAND PRODUCTION ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The specific environmental conditions characterizing the production areas analyzed.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The semi-arid tropical region of India, whose features are reviewed in the synthesis.

entities.name: MICROECONOMIC TREATMENT
entities.description: An integrated approach used to analyze agricultural development in dryland environments.
